description: Product Description Brown Kraft Bag Box with Clear Window– Pack of 12 Elegant & Functional Design Stylish white kraft boxes with a clear window — perfect for showcasing cookies, candies, or gifts. Perfect for Any Occasion Ideal for bakeries, parties, weddings, or festive gifting — simple yet elegant. Strong & Sturdy Design Made from premium kraft paper that stands upright and holds shape beautifully. Clear Display Window See-through window adds a premium, professional touch to your handmade treats. Eco-Friendly Choice Crafted from recyclable kraft paper — reusable, sustainable, and planet-friendly. Assembly Required The box requires assembly as they are not pre-assembled..
